zh.lifeSummary: 當Lawrence Crawford of Kilbirny於1504年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼時，他的父親Robert Crawford22歲，母親Helen Campbell-3歲。他於1524年與Helen Campbell在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1547年6月4日在他的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭諾斯 艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼。

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Lawrence Crawford of Kilbirny was born in 1504, in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Crawford, was 22 and his mother, Helen Campbell, was -3. He married Helen Campbell in 1524, in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 4 June 1547, in his hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Lawrence Crawford of Kilbirnyが1504年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルバーニーで生まれた時，父Robert Crawfordは22歳，母Helen Campbellは-3歳であった。1524年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルバーニーでHelen Campbellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1547年6月4日に故郷で43歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドノース エイルシュアイアキルバーニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lawrence Crawford of Kilbirny(이)가 1504년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬비른이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Crawford(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Helen Campbell(은)는 -3세였다. 그는 1524년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬비른이에서 Helen Campbell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1547년 6월 4일 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 노르스 에이르실르 킬비른이에 묻혔다.
